mapper.sql: id, application_id, policy_id, clause_id, policy_title, clause_text, hit_source, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO policy_hit_record (application_id, policy_id, clause_id, policy_title, clause_text, hit_source, created_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{policyId}, #{clauseId}, #{policyTitle}, #{clauseText}, #{hitSource}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE policy_hit_record SET application_id=#{applicationId}, policy_id=#{policyId}, clause_id=#{clauseId}, policy_title=#{policyTitle}, clause_text=#{clauseText}, hit_source=#{hitSource} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM policy_hit_record WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} ORDER BY created_at, id
